prestazioni: Supercharged 5.0L AJ-V8 Gen III (engine code: AJ133S) with a Harrop HTV2300 TVS supercharger upgrade (12psi boost, 650+ hp), paired with a custom XEDE ProV tuner remap optimized for 98 RON fuel and methanol-water injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual nozzles)

Full titanium exhaust system by Milltek Sport (cat-back with 3.5" primary tubes, resonated center section, and quad 4.5" titanium tips), combined with a GReddy E-Manage Ultimate piggyback for precise AFR control and ignition timing adjustments

KW Suspensions Variant 5 coilovers (XKR-S-specific valving, 8-position rebound damping, and adjustable top mounts) with Eibach ERS race springs (front: 12kg/mm, rear: 18kg/mm) and polyurethane subframe bushings by SuperPro (part SPF1047K) for chassis rigidity
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Prior Design (PD630 kit, including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and aggressive side skirts with integrated air vents for brake cooling)

Custom front splitter by Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with adjustable dive planes) and a fixed carbon rear wing by DAMD (XKR-S-specific, 1,200mm span, 3D-printed aluminum mounts for 150kg downforce at 150mph)

OEM+ interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery, 6-point Schroth harnesses), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub), and a custom digital dash by AIM MXS Strada (1.3" OLED, CAN bus integration for supercharger PSI, oil temp, and G-forces)
